## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Root Cause

Describe the underlying issue being fixed.

## Scope Control

- [ ] Change is minimal and targeted to the problem.
- [ ] No unrelated refactor or style-only churn.
- [ ] No business-logic change unless required by failing checks.

## Validation

List exact commands run and outcomes.

```text
go test ./...
```

## Risk and Rollback

Describe operational risk and rollback approach.
